exception.message: Filter incorrectly applied with invalid price range expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Filter incorrectly applied with invalid price range expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at
